## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] README Features list is stale**
  - **Status quo:** README.md:24-39 lists 14 features. Since v0.7.1, 7 new user-facing features were added but are not reflected.
  - **Likely cause:** Features shipped without README update in the same PRs.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add to README Features section:
    - Memory provenance, trust-aware retrieval, and sensitivity policies
    - Context, hook, and init commands for agent integration
    - Curated memory importer (Claude Code, Hermes formats)
    - OpenCode session importer
    - MCP HTTP server with authentication, CORS, and rate limiting
    - BM25 fallback search (when Ollama is offline)
    - Embedding-aware sync with cursor persistence
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or `/03-gh-go` (docs only, not blocking)
